title: Crimea: Drone incoming
description: 91 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of June 14 (from 18:00 on June 13), the enemy attacked 98 attack UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas, and imitation drones of the "Parody" type from the directions: Orel, Bryansk, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russia, Chauda, Gvardiyske - TOT AR Crimea. The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW units and unmanned systems,...

title: 900 missiles launched
description: 🫠 The Russian Federation is increasing its ballistic strikes, and Ukraine is facing a shortage of missiles for the Patriot, - NYT According to the publication, if in 2023 Russia launched 74 ballistic missiles at Ukraine, then in 2025 - almost 600. Since the beginning of this year, more than 400 launches have been recorded, and the current pace allows the Russian Federation to launch approximately 900 missiles per hour. NYT interlocutors include Ukrainian military, diplomats and...
description_en: 🫠 The Russian Federation is increasing its ballistic strikes, and Ukraine is facing a shortage of missiles for the Patriot, - NYT According to the publication, if in 2023 Russia launched 74 ballistic missiles at Ukraine, then in 2025 - almost 600. Since the beginning of this year, more than 400 launches have been recorded, and the current pace allows the Russian Federation to launch approximately 900 missiles per hour. NYT interlocutors include Ukrainian military, diplomats and...
description_uk: 🫠 рф наращивает удары баллистикой, а Украина сталкивается с нехваткой ракет для Patriot, - NYT Как пишет издание, если в 2023 году россия выпустила по Украине 74 баллистические ракеты, то в 2025-м - уже почти 600. С начала этого года было зафиксировано более 400 пусков, и текущие темпы позволяют рф выйти примерно на 900 ракет за год. Собеседники NYT среди украинских военных, дипломатов и...

title: Air defense active
description: Ukrainian "pisyun" flew in the sky over Germany Ukrainian company SkyFall showed the interceptor drone P1-SUN at the ILA Berlin Air Show - the largest aerospace exhibition in Europe. At the site in Berlin, other Ukrainian developments were also demonstrated, including the heavy strike drone-bomber Vampire and FPV-drones Shrike. Earlier, SkyFall and Airbus Defense and Space announced a strategic partnership....
description_en: Ukrainian "pisyun" flew in the sky over Germany Ukrainian company SkyFall showed the interceptor drone P1-SUN at the ILA Berlin Air Show - the largest aerospace exhibition in Europe. At the site in Berlin, other Ukrainian developments were also demonstrated, including the heavy strike drone-bomber Vampire and FPV-drones Shrike. Earlier, SkyFall and Airbus Defense and Space announced a strategic partnership....
description_uk: Украинский "писюн" пролетел в небе над Германией Украинская компания SkyFall показала дрон-перехватчик P1-SUN на ILA Berlin Air Show - крупнейшей аэрокосмической выставке Европы. На площадке в Берлине также демонстрировали другие украинские разработки, включая тяжелый ударный дрон-бомбер Vampire и FPV-дроны Shrike. Ранее SkyFall и Airbus Defence and Space объявили о стратегическом партнерстве....

title: Drone strike
description: Ukrainian forces hit chemical plant working for Russian military Drone operators from Ukraine's Unmanned Systems Forces have struck the Krymskyi Tytan chemical plant, whose products were used to manufacture gunpowder for the Russian armed forces. Read the full article on our website

title: Kyiv: 763 injured
description: UN records highest civilian casualty toll in Ukraine since 2022. The mission verified at least 274 civilian deaths and 1,763 injuries during the month, the highest monthly casualty toll recorded in the past four years.
